title: Mastering MERN Stack - 2026 Edition
description:
Mastering MERN Stack - 2026 Edition

A complete full-stack program that takes you from web foundations to building, securing, and deploying MERN applications at production scale.
author: RDCoders

topics.title: Module 01: JS Engines - Overview and mental models
